description: The main page before you select a project is missing all layouts. It needs to be design properly

log.outcome: This is a well-crafted specification for a CSS-only styling task. The spec accurately inventories all class names from both `ProjectOverview.tsx` and `ProjectGridSkeleton.tsx`, correctly references existing CSS patterns and variables, and appropriately scopes the work to a single file. The step breakdown is methodical and verifiable.
